sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: QQMG Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:QQMG
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the Invesco ESG NASDAQ 100 ETF (QQMG), including its current price, performance metrics, and key statistics like AUM and expense ratio. It details the fund's investment strategy, which focuses on NASDAQ-100 stocks with an ESG overlay, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and QQMG's specific characteristics.

feed.title: PMO SEC Filings - Putnam Municipal Opportunities 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of SEC filings for Putnam Municipal Opportunities (PMO), a closed-end municipal bond fund. It details the types of regulatory documents available, such as 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, and explains how these reports offer insights into the fund's investment objectives, portfolio holdings, and share repurchase activities. The page also highlights recent specific filings, including a small round-trip trade by Merrill Lynch and a shareholder vote on board governance.

feed.title: PLUG FINAL DEADLINE: ROSEN, A HIGHLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages Plug Power Inc. Investors ...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) who purchased securities between January 17, 2025, and November 13, 2025, to join a class action lawsuit. The deadline to serve as lead plaintiff is April 3, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Plug Power Inc. made false and misleading statements regarding its prospects for securing U.S. Department of Energy loan funds and its hydrogen production facilities.

feed.title: Truist Raises Vertex (VRTX) Price Target Following Phase 3 Trial Results
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) to $525 from $490, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment follows positive Week-36 interim results from Vertex's Phase 3 RAINIER study for IgAN, which met all primary and secondary objectives with a strong safety profile. While Stifel acknowledged the statistical relevance of the findings, it questioned the drug's differentiation from competing products in a crowded market.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (UNH) Expands AI Investments to Boost Efficiency
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) is expanding its investments in AI through Optum Insight to enhance healthcare efficiency and reduce costs starting in 2027. The company reiterated its forecast for over 8.5% growth this year, expecting to generate at least $18 billion in free cash flow, and plans to increase dividends, reduce debt, and continue share buybacks to achieve a debt-to-capital ratio of approximately 40% by year-end. Despite some Q4 underperformance in Optum Health and rising Medicare Advantage bids, UNH remains focused on strategic growth and innovation.

feed.title: Should You Invest in Expedia Group (EXPE)?
feed.summary: Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy initiated a position in Expedia Group, Inc. (EXPE) in Q4 2025, citing consistent double-digit growth in its B2B business despite sector-wide concerns about AI disintermediation. Expedia Group's stock closed at $236.65 on March 23, 2026, with a market cap of $29 billion, having shown strong performance over the past year. While 70 hedge funds held EXPE by the end of Q4 2025, the firm suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: POSCO Strengthens Rare Earth Supply Chain With Global Expansion
feed.summary: POSCO, through its subsidiary POSCO International, is implementing a comprehensive strategy to create a fully integrated rare earth supply chain. This involves investing KRW 25 billion in refining technologies, expanding raw material sourcing in Southeast Asia, and planning for permanent magnet production by 2028. The goal is to secure critical materials for electric vehicle components, enhance supply chain resilience, and capture more value in the rapidly evolving EV market.

feed.title: Corebridge Advances Governance Independence as AIG Influence Fades
feed.summary: Corebridge Financial, Inc. (CRBG) announced the resignations of two directors, Rose Marie Glazer and Adam Burk, on March 23, 2026, marking a further step towards independence from American International Group, Inc. (AIG). These resignations followed Corebridge's repurchase of common stock from AIG, reducing AIG's stake to approximately 5% and eliminating its board designation rights. The company's board will now downsize from 13 to 11 members, signifying increased governance autonomy.

feed.title: Masco Corp stock eyes gains ahead of Q1 2026 earnings release on April 22
feed.summary: Masco Corp (US5745991068) is preparing for its Q1 2026 earnings release on April 22, with analysts forecasting an EPS of around 0.88. The company's stock has shown resilience amidst housing market challenges, with recent price action indicating short-term upside potential. Masco's strong brand portfolio and focus on essential home fixtures position it well for the anticipated housing recovery and continued growth.

feed.title: Invesco (IVZ), a $2.2 trillion asset manager, joins BlackRock and peers in tokenized fund push
feed.summary: Invesco, a $2.2 trillion asset manager, is entering the tokenized fund market by taking over Superstate's $900 million tokenized U.S. Treasury fund. This move places Invesco alongside other major financial institutions like BlackRock and Franklin Templeton in the rapidly growing $12 billion tokenized U.S. Treasury market, which offers benefits like near-instant settlements and continuous trading. The fund will be rebranded as the Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund, while Superstate will continue to manage the underlying blockchain technology.

feed.title: Canada hotels report performance gains in February
feed.summary: Canada's hotel industry recorded performance increases in February 2026, marking a second consecutive month of year-over-year gains. Occupancy rose slightly by 0.2%, average daily rate (ADR) increased by 4.0% to CAD197.05, and revenue per available room (RevPAR) grew by 4.2% to CAD114.18. Manitoba led provincial gains with significant increases across all key metrics, while major markets like Vancouver showed strong occupancy and RevPAR growth, and Toronto registered the highest ADR gain despite an occupancy decline.

feed.title: Cemex joins 15 building materials firms with MSCI's top AAA ESG rating
feed.summary: Cemex has achieved the highest possible MSCI ESG rating of AAA, an upgrade from its previous A rating. This places Cemex among the top 15 companies in the global building materials industry for its management of financially relevant sustainability risks and opportunities. The upgrade reflects Cemex's commitment to sustainability, progress in operational practices, transparency, and integration of sustainability into its core business, according to CEO Jaime Muguiro.

feed.title: A $967M tokenized Treasury fund keeps its ticker as Invesco steps in
feed.summary: Invesco will become the investment manager for Superstate's $967 million tokenized short-duration U.S. Treasuries fund, USTB, effective in Q2 2026. This collaboration allows Invesco to leverage Superstate's digital transfer agent infrastructure while Superstate continues to manage the onchain technology. The fund, to be renamed Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund, will retain its USTB ticker and smart contracts.

feed.title: Invesco and Superstate Advance Institutional Tokenization Through USTB Partnership
feed.summary: Invesco, a global asset manager with $2.2 trillion in AUM, is partnering with Superstate, a fintech firm, for its flagship tokenized short-duration U.S. treasuries fund, USTB. Invesco will become the investment manager of USTB, which already holds over $967 million in AUM and is among the top five largest tokenized U.S. treasuries funds globally. Superstate will continue to provide its tokenization technology and onchain infrastructure, while Invesco's Global Liquidity team will manage the fund's portfolio.

feed.title: Microsoft in focus as BofA reinstates coverage with Buy rating (MSFT:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Bank of America has reinstated coverage of Microsoft (MSFT) with a Buy rating and a $500 price target. This re-initiation of coverage puts Microsoft in focus, highlighting BofA's positive outlook on the tech giant.

feed.title: PACCAR Parts To Highlight TRP, Online Parts Counter at MATS
feed.summary: PACCAR Parts will showcase its TRP line of all-makes parts and e-commerce solutions at the Mid-America Trucking Show (MATS) from March 26–28, 2026. The company will offer demonstrations of its Online Parts Counter (OPC) and highlight TRP parts, including diagnostic solutions like TRP Diagnostics Pro. Attendees who sign up for OPC at the show will be entered into a drawing for a TRP toolbox.

feed.title: Zeppelin, Wells Fargo settle litigation over RiNo office building on eve of trial
feed.summary: Zeppelin Development reached a settlement with Wells Fargo over the Zeppelin Station office building in RiNo, averting a scheduled trial. Developer Kyle Zeppelin expects to regain control of the property and hopes to retain Alterra Mountain Co. as its largest tenant while planning improvements to attract new businesses and revitalize the space. The settlement secures a "substantial discount" on the $32 million loan, and Zeppelin aims to pay it off within three months.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Boosts Salesforce Stake
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in Salesforce Inc. (NYSE:CRM) by 86.7% in the fourth quarter of 2025, adding 689,593 shares to its portfolio. The investment firm now holds 1,484,818 shares, valued at approximately $393 million, signaling strong confidence in Salesforce's growth prospects and market leadership. This move comes despite a recent pullback in Salesforce's stock price.

feed.title: Perma-Fix falls nearly 9% on fourth quarter earnings, revenue miss
feed.summary: Perma-Fix Environmental Services (NASDAQ:PESI) stock fell nearly 9% after reporting fourth-quarter earnings and revenue that missed analyst expectations. The company reported a Q4 loss of $0.31 per share and revenue of $15.7 million, both below forecasts. Despite the miss, the company highlighted a 29% revenue increase in its treatment segment and key progress in its Perm-Fix Northwest facility permit renewal, along with increased treatment backlog and international revenue.

feed.title: Netflix, Inc. $NFLX Shares Bought by Salem Investment Counselors Inc.

feed.title: FedEx boosts same-day shipping capabilities with OneRail deal (FDX:NYSE)
feed.summary: FedEx (FDX) is partnering with last-mile delivery company OneRail to launch a new same-day shipping program. This collaboration aims to enhance FedEx's ability to deliver packages to customers from retailers more quickly. The move reflects the ongoing competition in the logistics sector to provide faster delivery services.

feed.title: Vonage and ServiceNow Expand their Partnership
feed.summary: Vonage and ServiceNow have expanded their partnership by launching a native integration of Vonage Contact Center (VCC) with ServiceNow Voice. This integration embeds enterprise-grade voice and real-time AI capabilities directly into ServiceNow's Customer Service Management (CSM) and IT Service Management (ITSM) workflows. The collaboration aims to enhance agent productivity, streamline workflows, reduce manual effort, and improve customer engagement by providing a unified service environment and strengthening AI context.

feed.title: Broadcom Debuts Symantec CBX to Deliver Unified XDR Security
feed.summary: Broadcom has launched Symantec CBX (Carbon Black XDR), a new cloud-based platform that unifies Symantec and Carbon Black technologies. This solution targets organizations that face sophisticated cyber threats but lack the resources for complex security implementations or enterprise-grade Security Operations Centers (SOCs). CBX aims to provide advanced protection, faster investigations, and AI-powered insights across endpoints, networks, and data, making enterprise-grade security accessible to a broader market.

feed.title: Should Prudential’s CEO-Chair Shift and Asia Tech Hire Require Action From Prudential Financial (PRU) Investors?
feed.summary: Prudential Financial appointed CEO Andrew Sullivan as Chairman and Alex Wong as CITO for Greater China, concentrating leadership and focusing on technology in Asia. While these changes reinforce Prudential's strategy in retirement-centric offerings and digital transformation, the article suggests that investors should consider the growing execution risk associated with these shifts and compare multiple perspectives on the company's fair value.
